settings.heading: Connectivity built for real setups.
settings.copy: We make hubs, docks, cables, and chargers for people who need their gear to simply work.

settings.story_heading: Built around how people actually work.
settings.story_p1: EZQuest designs connectivity products for people who rely on their setups every day — hubs, docks, cables, and chargers built to work without thought.
settings.story_p2: We focus on the gap between what modern laptops offer and what real workflows need. One cable in, a clean desk, everything connected. No drivers, no guesswork.
settings.story_p3: Every product is designed to disappear into the setup — present when you need it, invisible when you don't.
settings.philosophy_body: We design for the moment where your laptop's port count stops matching your workflow. Portable hubs for the bag, docks for the desk, cables that hold up mid-meeting.
settings.philosophy_body2: Reliability means getting the specs right, testing real-world conditions, and documenting everything clearly so setup is never a guessing game.
settings.support_body: Manuals, downloads, compatibility guides, and direct help are always one click away. We build the support layer into the product experience — not as an afterthought.

settings.title: Built for real setups
settings.copy: Designed around the ports, power paths, and desk layouts that modern workflows actually demand.

settings.title: Universal compatibility
settings.copy: Plug-and-play on Mac and Windows. No drivers, no configuration, no surprises.

settings.title: Portable and permanent
settings.copy: A hub for the bag. A dock for the desk. Products designed for both ends of the workflow spectrum.

settings.title: Support built in
settings.copy: Every product ships with clear documentation and connects to a full support system — not a FAQ dead end.

settings.title: Compatibility
settings.desc: Check device and system support before you buy.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.desc: Drivers, firmware, and software when needed.

settings.title: Contact support
settings.desc: Reach the team directly for product-specific help.

settings.heading: Find the product built for your setup.
settings.copy: Browse the full lineup, compare models side by side, or start with support if you have a question first.
